name: Fairview Park Sherman TX
description: 6 lighted courts for open play pickleball.
open_play_schedule: Open play everyday from 4AM until midnight

name: Four Seasons Racquet Club
description:
Climate controlled
New LED lighting
Seating for spectators
open_play_schedule: Open 7 days a week from 8AM to 10PM; Open play from 8AM to 11AM

name: Lake Texoma Thousand Trails
description: Lake Texoma Thousand Trails is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Gordonville, TX. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Parkside Baptist Church, The ROC
description: Parkside Baptist Church, The ROC is a place to play pickleball in Denison, TX. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and water.

name: Taylor Street Gym
description: Taylor Street Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sherman, TX. There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: The Backyard at Waterloo Park
description: The Backyard at Waterloo Park is a place to play pickleball in Denison, TX. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: The Gym at First Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at The Gym at First Baptist Church in Sherman, TX! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: The Point Sportsplex
description: Come play pickleball at The Point Sportsplex in Pilot Point, TX! There are 3 indoor hard and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, trainers or lessons, youth programming, adaptive programming, and lights. The courts can be reserved.
fees: Fee required — Membership $45/mo, Open Play $10, Court Rental $45/hour up to 6 per court

name: Van Alstyne Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Van Alstyne Recreation Center in Van Alstyne, TX! There are 2 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — For Resident- Day pass $5 Monthly Membership $10 For Non-Resident Day pass $10 Monthly Membership $20
